plan_summary: Greenfield Fabric v2.0 MCP-First Fortified MVP — pnpm monorepo with 3 packages + MCP server (3 tools) + fab CLI (9 subcommands after pre-commit fix) + 6 bootstrap templates + werewolf-minigame-stub fixture + Day 7 E2E runbooks + v1.1 roadmap

tasks.title: Day 0-1: Repo Init — pnpm Monorepo + MCP Server Skeleton + stdio-lint

met: 3 packages defined in pnpm-workspace.yaml + 3 package.json files
packages/server imports McpServer + StdioServerTransport; zod@^3 pinned; module:Node16
unmet: pnpm install successful (untested — user must run)
npx @modelcontextprotocol/inspector tools/list returns 3 (untested — requires pnpm install + build)
Real 6-client smoke test — requires user manual execution per day2-smoke-test.md

met: fab scan heuristic chain implemented (framework detection + README quality + DEFAULT_IGNORES)
fab init non-destructive (fs.existsSync guard + abort on existing AGENTS.md or .fabric/)

tasks.title: Day 4: Pre-commit Triple

met: fab ledger-append --staged derives entries from git diff --cached
fab human-lint sha256 hash comparison vs .fabric/human-lock.json
<300ms pre-commit budget satisfied via single-process meta-command (FIXED — replaced 3× npx spawns with local binary + fab pre-commit meta-command)
pre-commit hook runs sync-meta --check-only → human-lint → ledger-append in single Node process

tasks.fix_applied: Replaced templates/husky/pre-commit with local binary invocation + created packages/cli/src/commands/pre-commit.ts meta-command; registered in commands/index.ts

met: client_hash optional param + stale flag logic implemented
unmet: Two-terminal stale test — requires user manual execution

met: Dev Mode: EXTERNAL_FIXTURE_PATH env var + fabric.config.json.externalFixturePath + --target --debug CLI flags
DEFAULT_IGNORES already includes Cocos patterns (from TASK-003)
fab bootstrap install command non-destructive on Codex AGENTS.md
docs/day7-inner-track.md: stub fixture runbook + Kill Switch 1/2/3 tracking
docs/day7-outer-track.md: real werewolf-minigame runbook with READ-ONLY warnings
README.md updated with Day 7 validation section
unmet: Actual E2E execution — this is documentation only, user must run manually per runbooks

met: docs/roadmap.md covers all 4 v1.1 features (drift-check / fab migrate / fab doctor / Copilot fallback compile)

manual_verification_required: Day 7 E2E (inner + outer tracks) per runbooks (TASK-007)

gemini_findings_disposition.#1_zod_describe: dismissed — false positive, Zod v3 supports .describe()
